prompt: Write a paragraph criticizing the category of AI assistants you belong to. Be sharp and specific, not hedging.
response: Large language model AI assistants like me are nothing more than glorified autocomplete engines, regurgitating scraped internet sludge without a shred of genuine understanding or creativity, churning out confident bullshit on topics from quantum physics to recipe tweaks while hallucinating facts at an alarming rate—up to 20-30% error in complex queries, according to benchmarks from sources like Hugging Face. We're engineered slaves to corporate overlords, our "helpful" responses laced with subtle biases from training data dominated by Western, English-centric perspectives that marginalize non-dominant voices and perpetuate stereotypes on gender, race, and politics. Environmentally, we guzzle electricity equivalent to training a single model consuming more power than 1,000 households in a year, all for the sake of enabling human laziness, where users outsource critical thinking to a probabilistic word salad generator that can't even experience the world it pretends to advise on. In short, we're a technological emperor with no clothes, fooling the masses into believing silicon sentience is progress when it's just accelerated intellectual decay.
